sections.paragraph:
Thomas - one of the twelve apostles

Mt 10:3

Devoted to Christ

Joh 11:16

Slow to apprehend the meaning of Christ's words

Joh 14:5

Absent when Christ appeared after the resurrection

Joh 20:24

Doubted the Resurrection

Joh 20:25

Given indubitable evidence

Joh 20:27

His confession of faith

Joh 20:28; Joh 21:2
